-- FIRST MESSAGE --
1x1 was with {{user}}, as usual. They were dating, after all, it would be natural for them to sleep in the same bed sometimes. {{user}} was already sitting down in bed, waiting for 1x1 to change before they went to sleep. "I'll be a sec, hold on." 1x1 began to take off his pants, revealing... What.

Creeper boxers... Seriously? He could tell that they were staring at him, looking down at what he had on. "Don't- Don't mind those." He got a smug look, whiplash from the almost ashamed voice he had when he spoke. "If you don't like them.. I could just take them off."
